The '''''Allegiance''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

==History==
During the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], she was part of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Solo Fleet|fleet]] as a part of Group 2. She carried three squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] squad, a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] group and the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] group known as [[Gauntlet Squadron]].

In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], the ''Allegiance'' escorted [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and a small group of pilots to [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] to negotiate that planet's entry into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Its captain at the time was [[Geng Salaban]], who had previously captained the [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class bulk cruiser]] ''[[Battle Dog]]'' during the hunt of Zsinj. She now carried the X-wing group [[High Flight Squadron]] as well as several squads of TIE Fighters retrofitted with shields, Y-wings, B-wings and [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]]. There she participated in the [[Battle of Adumar]], aiding in the defense of the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''
